Developer by craft. Designer by instinct.

Scroll
About Me

Designer. Developer.
ASU Senior.

I'm a Media Arts & Sciences senior at ASU with a background in Computer Science, making the switch when I realized I cared more about what technology feels like than just how it works.

Six years in IT gave me a deep respect for systems that actually hold up under pressure. That same sensibility carries into everything I build — clean, durable, and worth the attention it asks for.

Audio is my other language. From Ableton to FMOD to hand-rolled hardware, if it makes sound and requires code, I'm in.

Based in Phoenix, AZASU Spring 2026Open to opportunities

Projects

View Project
UnityFMODC#XR Interaction Toolkit+1

VR Gesture Instrument

A year-long capstone exploring what VR uniquely enables for musical expression through gesture-driven sound and immersive audiovisual feedback.

Read more
View Project
PythonNLPNLTKOpenCV+2

Multimodal AI Chatbot

A conversational AI that processes both natural language and digital images, enabling mood-reactive visual transformations and context-aware dialogue.

Read more
View Project
ResearchRecommendation SystemsSpotifyData Analysis+1

Spotify Recommendation Algorithm Research Zine

A research-driven editorial zine exploring how Spotify recommendation systems shape listening behavior, discovery, and personalization.

Read more
View Project
M5StickRotary EncoderArduinoBLE MIDI+3

DIY CDJ with DAW Integration

A custom DIY CDJ + DAW workflow using an M5Stick controller, BLE MIDI signaling, and a Swift macOS app for hands-on music control.

Read more
View Project
PythonPandasscikit-learnPower BI+1

AQI Prediction Dashboard

A linear-regression AQI forecasting project paired with a Power BI decision-support dashboard for global city-level air quality analysis.

Read more
